name: Identity Attribution Layer
edge_case_handling: Anonymous creator requires escrow identity resolution

name: Content Encoding Layer
edge_case_handling: Corrupted encoding triggers re-encoding from source

name: Structured Metadata Layer
edge_case_handling: Missing metadata auto-populated from content analysis with human review flag

name: Cryptographic Hash Layer
edge_case_handling: Hash collision (theoretical) requires secondary verification method

name: License Definition Layer
tech_spec: CC + custom TrueMark License v1 + usage restrictions
implications: Governs all commercial and derivative use
edge_case_handling: Conflicting license terms require priority resolution rule (TrueMark > derivative)

name: Multi-Time Anchor Layer
edge_case_handling: Clock skew across sources requires median consensus

name: Multi-Chain Anchor Layer
tech_spec: Multiple L1/L2 anchors (e.g., Ethereum, Polygon, etc.)
edge_case_handling: Chain-specific outage requires fallback to alternate chain

name: Encryption Layer
edge_case_handling: Key rotation policy must be enforced every 2 years

name: Digital Signature Layer
edge_case_handling: Signature algorithm deprecation requires migration plan

name: Certificate Render Layer
tech_spec: PDF + SVG + HTML with embedded metadata
edge_case_handling: Render template update requires versioned certificate re-generation

name: QR Verification Layer
tech_spec: Dynamic QR with offline fallback hash
edge_case_handling: QR degradation over time requires refresh protocol

name: Audit Trace Layer
edge_case_handling: Log volume explosion requires summarization + archiving

name: Registry Anchor Layer
edge_case_handling: Registry outage requires cached local validation
